description: Golden eval dataset for the BOQ item AI suggester. Each case describes what *correct* looks like — not the exact wording the model must use, but the constraints the output must satisfy (HSN/SAC pattern, allowed units, descriptive content, item-kind classification). Add new cases at the end; never edit existing ones, otherwise historical eval results become incomparable.

cases.name: rcc_slab_ground_floor
cases.input: RCC slab work for ground floor with 4-inch thickness

cases.name: modular_kitchen_island
cases.input: modular kitchen with island and quartz countertop

cases.name: external_plastering
cases.input: external wall plastering 20mm thick cement mortar

cases.name: electrical_point_wiring
cases.input: light point wiring including switch and conduit, 4 sqmm copper

cases.name: premium_vitrified_tile_upgrade
cases.input: upgrade from standard ceramic tile to premium 800x800 vitrified — customer chose this above base scope

cases.name: tmt_steel_reinforcement
cases.input: Fe500 TMT steel reinforcement for slab and columns
